title: Mary Solmonson
compiled_truth: Mary Solmonson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-05-24), Mary Solmonson sent 76 and received 428 emails, totalling 504 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (73), [Thomas Gros](people/thomas-gros) (13), [James Scribner](people/james-scribner) (10), [Bob Hall](people/bob-hall) (9), [Patti Thompson](people/patti-thompson) (9).
